objective.goal: Improve quality of breakout entries in earnings season

strategy_context.summary: Trade post-earnings breakouts when price confirms above key intraday levels.
known_pain_points: False breakouts on weak opening volume

execution_constraints: No more than one add-on per position

market_context.summary: Risk-on regime with concentrated earnings leadership in growth sectors.
observations: High-relative-volume names tend to hold VWAP in first hour
Continuation quality drops when index breadth weakens intraday

common_winner_traits: First pullback holds above intraday VWAP

journal_snippets.note: Tighter volume filter reduced false starts but lowered trade count.
Tick-level imbalance idea was unstable across data providers.
